# Accessible Places

> A free web app that helps people with wheelchairs or limited mobility find accessible venues in Germany, Austria and Switzerland (DACH region).

## About

Accessible Places aggregates wheelchair accessibility data from multiple open data sources, deduplicates and merges records, assigns a per-criterion confidence score, and presents results on an interactive map and list view.

The app is a private, non-commercial hobby project by Andreas Knoor.

## Supported countries

Germany (Deutschland), Austria (Österreich), Switzerland (Schweiz)

## Supported categories

Restaurants, cafés, hotels, beer gardens, pubs, museums, theatres, cinemas, ice cream shops

## Data sources

- OpenStreetMap (OSM) — community-maintained open map data
- accessibility.cloud — aggregated accessibility data from ~170 datasets
- Wheelmap.org — crowd-sourced wheelchair accessibility ratings

## Languages

German (Deutsch), English

## Key pages

- /: Main search interface
- /faq: Frequently asked questions (DE + EN)
- /impressum: Legal notice / Impressum
